vocab.meaning: những ngày khó khăn/cần tiền khẩn cấp
vocab.example: Most people use savings accounts to put some money aside for a rainy day.

vocab.meaning: khoản tiền tiết kiệm dự phòng cho tương lai (thường là khi nghỉ hưu)
vocab.example: Banks provide a secure environment for individuals to build up a substantial nest egg over the years.
Keeping large sums of cash at home is risky, so using a bank gives people much-needed peace of mind.

vocab.meaning: tích góp tiền bạc cho bản thân (thường dùng để chỉ việc làm giàu)
vocab.example: Through clever investments and high-interest accounts, savvy customers can effectively feather their nest.

vocab.meaning: tốn rất nhiều tiền/chi hết sạch tiền (ngữ cảnh vay vốn để không phải chi một lúc)
vocab.example: Taking out a personal loan allows people to make large purchases without having to break the bank all at once.

vocab.meaning: giúp ai đó vượt qua giai đoạn khó khăn (về tài chính)
vocab.example: Banks offer credit facilities or overdrafts that can tide small businesses over during periods of low cash flow.

vocab.meaning: tiết kiệm/chi tiêu khéo léo để tiền dùng được lâu hơn
vocab.example: By using automated budgeting tools provided by banks, consumers can learn how to stretch their money further.

vocab.meaning: trong tình trạng nợ nần/âm tiền
vocab.example: Banks notify users when their account is in the red, helping them avoid further financial penalties.

vocab.meaning: nơi trú ẩn an toàn (nghĩa bóng: nơi giữ tiền an toàn)
vocab.example: For many, a reputable bank acts as a financial bolt-hole where their life savings are protected from inflation.
Online banking platforms make it incredibly easy to keep track of every penny spent throughout the month.
